llmResponse.agenda_changes: Two items moved from regular action/consent to consent agenda: Item 10.6 (Approval of Local Interagency Agreement to Provide Education and Training to Credential Candidates) and Item 10.7 (Approval of Personnel Report). President Wells stated: 'I'm going to recommend two that I didn't catch earlier, but I think 10.6 and 10.7, after reviewing the packet, seemed pretty perfunctory, and I thought we could move them to consent unless someone has something that they need to discuss about them.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I get a motion to approve all the consent items second. All in favor? Aye.
